prompt: A full-body high-fashion street style portrait of a slim woman standing against a smooth gray concrete wall in a minimalist studio-like setting, centered in frame, looking slightly to the side with her dark hair pulled into a sleek low bun. She wears a fitted black long-sleeve turtleneck that hugs the body, ultra-oversized dark indigo baggy jeans with an extremely low-rise waist, dramatic extra-wide legs, heavy stacking and pooling on the floor, distressed faded whiskering, and large ripped worn patches on both legs, plus chunky black shoes barely visible beneath the denim. Her pose is relaxed and confident: one hand tucked into the front pocket, the other holding a small structured tan mini handbag. Add subtle gold jewelry including bracelets and small earrings. Soft even editorial lighting, realistic fashion photography, clean muted tones, sharp fabric texture, luxury streetwear aesthetic, full-body composition with ample vertical space, contemporary magazine-style styling.
